---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error, inconsistency, or broken cross-reference in the NEXUS blueprint
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug", "blueprint"]
assignees: []
---

## What is wrong?

A clear, specific description. Quote the offending text or reference the document
by path and `NX-DOC-####` ID.

## Where

- File path:
- Section / heading:
- Line number (if known):
- Document ID (if applicable, e.g. `NX-DOC-0042`):

## Expected vs. actual

**Expected:**
<!-- What the document should say or reference -->

**Actual:**
<!-- What it currently says -->

## Impact

- [ ] Inconsistent terminology
- [ ] Broken cross-reference (`NX-DOC-####` points to nothing)
- [ ] Contradicts another document (specify which)
- [ ] Outdated (specify what changed)
- [ ] Mermaid diagram does not render
- [ ] Markdown link is broken
- [ ] Other (describe)

## Suggested fix

Optional. A proposed replacement paragraph or corrected reference.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I am reporting from the official blueprint repository
